workshops.title: Sourdough Ramen & Handmade Noodles
workshops.description: Learn to turn basic organic flour and spring water into elastic, rich ramen noodles. We'll make the broth from scratch and finish with a full bowl.

workshops.title: Urban Sketching: Ink & Line Basics
workshops.description: Grab a pen and notebook! Learn to capture buildings, streets, and everyday scenes with loose, confident line work. We'll cover perspective, gesture, and quick shading.

workshops.title: Intro to Jazz Guitar & Improvisation
workshops.description: No experience needed! Learn basic chord shapes, strumming patterns, and the secret to sounding jazzy. You'll play your first 12-bar blues by end of class.

workshops.title: Botanical Watercolor Painting
workshops.description: Paint wildflowers and garden plants using classic watercolor techniques. We'll cover wet-on-wet, color mixing, and negative painting. Supplies provided.

workshops.title: Backyard Food Forest & Composting
workshops.description: Turn any outdoor space into a productive food forest. Learn companion planting, no-dig beds, and how to build a hot compost system that works year-round.

workshops.title: Traditional Kimchi & Fermentation
workshops.description: Learn the ancient art of lacto-fermentation. We'll make classic kimchi, quick pickles, and a simple sauerkraut you can take home in a mason jar.

members.name: Alex Rivera
members.bio: Home cook and fermentation enthusiast. I learned traditional techniques from my grandmother and have been sharing them with neighbors for years. Let's make something delicious together!
members.livedExperience: Spent 3 years learning fermentation and preservation techniques through family tradition and community cooking workshops before moving to Maplewood.

members.name: Maya Chen
members.bio: Full-time ceramics instructor and weekend watercolor artist. I love teaching beginners the joy of making things with their hands.
members.livedExperience: BFA in Craft & Material Studies. Founder of the Saturday Clay Club. Teaching hand-building ceramics for 7 years.

members.name: Sam Okafor
members.bio: Musician and music teacher. Jazz guitarist by training, folk music by heart. I run a weekly jam session and love introducing people to improvisation.
members.livedExperience: Berklee College of Music graduate. 10+ years teaching guitar and music theory to all ages.

members.name: Priya Nair
members.bio: Urban gardener and herbalist. I turned my backyard into a food forest and want to show you how to grow your own food, even in small spaces.
members.livedExperience: Certified permaculture designer. Runs the Green Valley community garden plot. 5 years teaching urban farming.
